title: Symantec block Email
content:
This playbook will block email address at your email gateway.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (Symantec_Messaging_Gateway, xsoar-supported).

Inputs — EmailToBlock: The email address that will be blocked..

Integrations/scripts used: IsIntegrationAvailable, smg-block-email.

name: Symantec block Email
description: This playbook will block email address at your email gateway.
